prompt: We have two simple functions — applyGreyscale and applyInvertColors in image-effects.ts — that iterate all pixels. They're small but called on every page of multi-hundred-page PDFs. Can you add these to a WASM module alongside any other pixel processing? I'd rather have one WASM crate for all image effects than separate ones per function.

assertions.text: Creates a SINGLE Rust crate (not multiple) that exports all image effect functions
Exports at minimum: apply_greyscale, apply_invert, apply_color_adjustments, apply_scanner_processing
One TypeScript loader and one WasmProvider entry for the unified module
Rust code is organized into internal modules (e.g., mod greyscale, mod color) — not all in one file
Addresses multi-hundred-page use case — discusses or implements batch processing, buffer reuse, or in-place mutation
